title: citronella silvatica
intro: Citronella silvatica, a tropical plant native to Sri Lanka, is a type of grass in the lemongrass family and is known for its distinctive citrus scent. The medicinal properties of Citronella silvatica include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Citronella silvatica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. Citronella silvatica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used for medicinal purposes.
